.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Update the Maven Wrapper version constant to a newer patch release.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 8 to Java 11 to support the new runtime.
Set Kotlin compiler JVM target to 11 to align with the Java version migration.
Upgrade the Quarkus framework version to 2.0.2.Final which requires Java 11.
Switch dependency management from quarkus-bom to quarkus-universe-bom to align with Quarkus 2.0 platform changes.
Add the Quarkus Kotlin extension dependency to support Kotlin code compilation in Quarkus 2.0.
Add the Quarkus REST Client extension dependency.
Add the Quarkus JGit extension dependency.
Add the Quarkus RESTEasy Jackson extension dependency, replacing JSON-B.
Add the Quarkus Hibernate Validator extension dependency.
Add the Quarkus SmallRye Health extension dependency.
Add the Quarkus Logging Sentry extension dependency.
Add the Quarkus SmallRye OpenAPI extension dependency.
Add the Quarkus SmallRye Metrics extension dependency.
Add the Quarkus Undertow extension dependency.
Add Apache Commons Compress library dependency.
Add Google Analytics Java library dependency.
Add Hoverfly Java JUnit 5 library for testing.
Add AssertJ Core library for testing.
Add Quarkus DevTools Testing dependency for testing.
Remove the Quarkus RESTEasy JSON-B extension dependency in favor of Jackson.
Upgrade Maven Surefire plugin version to 3.0.0-M5.
Upgrade Rest-Assured library version to 4.3.2.
Upgrade Kotlin library version to 1.4.32.
Configure Maven resources to filter application.properties.

.dockerignore.general_idea: Include source code directory in the Docker build context to support Quarkus native or dev-mode builds.
Include the Maven POM file in the Docker build context to allow dependency resolution or build steps inside the container.
Include the Quarkus application directory structure required for the runner image in Quarkus 2.0.
Include custom Maven settings file to support private repositories or specific build configurations during Docker build.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add Eclipse factory path file to gitignore to prevent IDE metadata from being tracked.
Ignore the local Maven node wrapper directory to avoid committing generated or local tooling artifacts.
Ensure the gitignore file ends with a newline character for POSIX compliance.

.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven distribution version used by the wrapper to 3.8.1.
Upgrade the Maven Wrapper JAR version to 0.7.7.

mvnw.general_idea: Bump the Maven Wrapper JAR version from 0.5.5 to 0.5.6 to align with newer tooling standards.
Correct the header comment to remove the obsolete '2' from 'Maven2'.
Clean up trailing whitespace in the script for better code hygiene.
mvnw.human_impl: Removed trailing spaces after curl command

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper JAR version from 0.5.5 to 0.5.6 to align with newer tooling standards.
Correct a minor typo in the batch script comments from 'key stroke' to 'keystroke'.
mvnw.cmd.human_impl: @REM MAVEN_BATCH_PAUSE - set to 'on' to wait for a keystroke before ending

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Update the script header comment to remove the outdated 'Maven2' designation.

src/main/frontend/.env.general_idea: Remove the SKIP_PREFLIGHT_CHECK environment variable to enforce standard React preflight checks during the frontend build process.

src/main/frontend/.gitignore.general_idea: Remove the /node directory from gitignore as it is likely no longer used or relevant to the project structure.
Add .history/ to gitignore to exclude version history files from the repository.
Add common IntelliJ IDEA artifact patterns to gitignore to prevent IDE-specific files from being committed.

src/main/frontend/README.md.general_idea: Add a specific project title and CI badge to the frontend README to identify the application.

src/main/frontend/README.md.general_idea: Replace detailed script explanations with concise commands for installing, starting, and testing the frontend.
